regime_read: ES & NQ moving together — broad agreement, more DURABLE directional signal. Trust the direction more.
narrative:
Macro backdrop —
[2026-06-26] US economic state (FRED):
  Growth: real GDP 2.1% (q/q ann)
  Inflation: CPI 3.9% YoY | core CPI 2.58% | core PCE 3.14% (Fed target 2%)
  Labor: unemployment 4.3%
  Rates: fed funds 3.63% | 10Y 4.41% | 10Y-2Y 0.31% (NORMAL)
  Consumer: UMich sentiment 49.8 | VIX 18.63

---
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (as of 2026-06-26 ~12:30 UTC)

1) MOVE-BY-MOVE READ
Both indices are soft this morning and trading below their prior-day midpoints. ES is at 7398 (-0.34% on the day, -1.47% on the week); NQ is at 29417.5 (-1.03% on the day, -2.79% on the week). NQ is the heavier underperformer, which fits the catalyst tape: the news flow is dominated by an AI-driven risk-on impulse ('Futures Jump As Micron Revives AI Euphoria', WD/Seagate boosted on the Micron beat) that appears to be FADING into the cash open — the tech euphoria headline is dated yesterday, and NQ has bled back toward its prior-day low (29295.75) and its session VWAP (29396.34). The geopolitical headlines (Iran inspections accepted, oil erasing war gains, Rubio/Vance commentary) are net de-escalatory and energy-deflationary — supportive of risk in the medium term but not driving a fresh impulse this morning. Net: an AI-pop is being digested/given back, with NQ leading the give-back. ES is comparatively sticky, sitting right on its VWAP (7389) and just above its prior-day low (7390.5 = prior-week low too). That ES level is a confluence shelf.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ
ES: 5-day POC sits up at 7440.28 with a value area of 7416.96–7545.20. Price at 7398 is BELOW value — trading at the lower edge/below the accumulation shelf. The line in the sand is the cluster of HVNs at 7416–7452: reclaiming 7417 (value-area low) puts price back inside accepted value and is bullish; staying capped below it keeps the bears in control with downside toward the 7361 range low. NQ: POC 29741.6, value area 29392.74–30657.38. NQ at 29417.5 is hovering right at value-area-low (29392.74) — a knife-edge. Holding above ~29393 keeps NQ technically inside value; losing it opens air down toward the 29196 range low and the prior-week low (29264.75). CAVEAT: this is volume-at-price (WHERE trade occurred), NOT order-flow delta — it tells us about acceptance/structure, not buy/sell aggression. Don't over-read it as conviction.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME
Contemporaneous correlation is high at 0.939 and the regime tags BREADTH — ES and NQ are moving together, no divergence, no clean leader (best cross-lag corr is a noisy 0.086). The read: broad agreement makes the DIRECTION more durable/trustworthy when it commits, but right now the joint signal is pointing modestly DOWN/sideways, not up. Importantly, the small return spread is negative (NQ underperforming ES intraday), a faint hint of de-risking out of the highest-beta names rather than a clean rotation. Implication: because breadth is intact you can trust a committed move more, but there is no committed move yet — both are pinned at VWAP/value-edge. That argues for SIZE DISCIPLINE, not aggression.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS
We are 4 days from PCE (2026-06-30, 8:30 ET — the Fed's preferred inflation gauge; news already flags 'PCE may stoke overblown Fed fears'). Then ISM Manufacturing (07-01), and NFP (07-03, high-impact). This is a compressed, event-heavy week: a friendly PCE could re-ignite the AI/risk bid, a hot one re-prices the Fed. Action: reduce size into the PCE window, widen stops / size down into NFP, and do NOT carry oversized directional risk through these prints. Note these are CADENCE ESTIMATES, not verified release dates — confirm against the official calendar.

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS
Meta-regime: BREADTH (correlated, trustworthy direction) layered over a FADING AI-euphoria pop, with NQ leading the give-back and both instruments pinned at VWAP / value-area-low. The structure is two-sided and balanced: above long-term trend (both well above SMA200, ES +6.4%, NQ +12.7% — broader uptrend intact) but short-term offered and sitting on knife-edge support, into a pre-PCE event window. That is the textbook setup for LOW CONVICTION. I am NEUTRAL with a slight short-term downside lean while NQ trades below 29393 / ES below 7417. Bias: NEUTRAL, ~48% confidence. Tactically: a defend-the-shelf LONG only triggers on NQ reclaiming and holding 29393 (value-area-low) with ES back inside 7417 — that would re-enter value and align with the durable BREADTH uptrend. A momentum SHORT continuation is valid below NQ 29295 (prior-day low), invalidated on a reclaim of value. Hard invalidation for any bullish thesis: NQ below 29264.75 (prior-week low) opens the 29196 range low and turns the structure decisively bearish. CONFIDENCE GRADE: LOW — news is mixed (de-escalatory geopolitics + a one-day-old AI pop being faded), lead-lag is clean on correlation but offers NO directional leader, and we're inside an event window. I am deliberately not manufacturing certainty here. Track-record note: this scorecard is unproven (n=8, regime accuracy 0.353, still CALIBRATING) — treat this as intelligence/context, not a validated edge.
